productDisplayName: Hanes Women Pack of Three 100% Cotton Plain Hipsters
description: Composition Pack of three hipster women's briefs in black,white and skin, made from 100% combed cotton jersey fabric, has a mid-rise styling, sits on the waist and provides added front and back coverage, fabric covered waistband and printed label for abrasion-free comfort Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry cleanable hanes knows how to deliver basics which are practical, comfortable and stylish. Crafted using soft absorbent cotton fabric with duo-dry moisture management technology which helps the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior stretch elastic offers easy leg movement. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8& rdquo and waist 28"The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
